name: Singularities & Laurent Series
description: Classification: removable, pole, essential. Laurent expansion in annulus. Residue = c₋₁. Meromorphic = holomorphic except poles.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Isolated sing\nf holomorphic on\npunctured D(z₀,r)"]
    D2["Def: Laurent series\nf = Σ cₙ(z−z₀)ⁿ\nn ∈ ℤ"]
    D3["Def: Removable\nlim f exists finite"]
    D4["Def: Pole\nfinitely many neg\nLaurent coeffs"]
    D5["Def: Essential\ninfinitely many neg\nLaurent coeffs"]
    T1["Thm: Laurent expansion\nunique in annulus"]
    T2["Thm: Riemann removable\nbounded ⇒ extendable"]
    T3["Thm: Pole order m\n⇔ (z−z₀)ᵐf bounded"]
    T4["Thm: Residue = c₋₁"]
    T5["Thm: Meromorphic\n= ratio of holomorphic"]
    L1["Lemma: Casorati–Weierstrass"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D1 --> D4
    D1 --> D5
    D2 --> T1
    D2 --> T4
    D3 --> T2
    D4 --> T3
    D5 --> L1
    T1 --> T2
    T1 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
    class L1 lemma
